sharedEntities.description: Represents loan sale status changes that are captured and published as notifications
Represents completed batch purchases with financial summaries that are published to notification subscribers
Represents fee charges that are published as notifications for accounting and reconciliation purposes
Represents investor reassignments that are published to notification subscribers
Represents loan type modifications that are published to notification subscribers
Represents alerts about overdue loans that are published to notification subscribers

dataFlows.name: Loan Selling Event Notification Flow
dataFlows.description: Captures loan selling domain events and distributes them to subscribers via the Hooks Hub
steps: Domain event occurs in COS.Lending.Selling domain
Event is captured by COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks service
Service transforms event into standardized notification format
Notification is published to CosLending Hooks Hub via NServiceBus
Subscribers receive notifications from the Hooks Hub

integrationPoints.description: Publishes standardized loan selling notifications that can be consumed by subscribers of the Hooks Hub
Authenticates requests to the hooks service to ensure secure publishing of notifications

patterns.description: Implements a hooks pattern where domain events are converted to standardized notifications that can be subscribed to by other systems
Uses events to decouple the loan selling domain from consumers interested in loan selling activities
Uses NServiceBus for reliable message-based integration with the Hooks Hub

ambiguities: How subscribers register their interest in specific notification types
The exact business rules that trigger each type of notification
Whether notifications include historical data or just current state changes
How failed notification deliveries are handled and retried
The complete set of external systems consuming these notifications
